CalendarExceptionExceptionType.title:
- SKIP: skip execution on this date
 - RESCHEDULE: move execution to different date
 - EXTRA: add extra execution on this date

MonthlyRuleDayType.title:
- DAY_OF_MONTH: e.g., 15th of every month
 - WEEKDAY_OF_MONTH: e.g., first Monday of month
 - LAST_WEEKDAY: e.g., last Friday of month
 - LAST_DAY: last day of month

QueueServiceAcknowledgeMessageBody.title: Acknowledge the message on the queue

QueueServiceGetNextMessageBody.title: Get the next message on the queue

QueueServiceRenewMessageLeaseBody.title: Renew lease period of a message

QueueServiceRequeueFromDLQBody.title: Requeue message from DLQ back to original queue

QueueServiceSendMessageHeartBeatBody.title: send a heartbeat to the queue

QueueServiceValidatePayloadBody.title: Validate a payload against a schema

protobufNullValue.description:
`NullValue` is a singleton enumeration to represent the null value for the
`Value` type union.

The JSON representation for `NullValue` is JSON `null`.

 - NULL_VALUE: Null value.

dayOffset.title: offset from business day (e.g., -1 for day before)

validFrom.title: Optional date range for rule validity

rule.title: for complex holidays like "first Monday in May"

count.title: Number of execution times to preview (default: 10, max: 100)

v1PreviewCalendarScheduleRequest.title: Preview upcoming execution times for a calendar schedule

v1RegisterSchemaRequest.title: Register a new schema or schema version

isActive.title: Whether this schema version is active

v1Schema.title: Schema defines a message validation schema

v1SchemaInfo.title:
Schema information for list responses
Note: This is a summary view with aggregated version info, different from schema.v1.Schema
